title: Crepinia lemaitrei
taxonomy: Crepinia lemaitrei is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It belongs to the genus Crepinia and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Crepinia lemaitrei is a member of the order Asparagales and is closely related to other species within the same family. The plant's classification is further divided into the subfamily Agavoideae, which is a group of plants known for their succulent and leafy characteristics. Crepinia lemaitrei's classification is also supported by its unique combination of morphological and molecular characteristics.
